case_title: FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC VS. MJSF, LP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MJSF, LP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4 MINT PLAZA AKA 414 JESSIE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED FEB-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIFTH HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MJSF, LP
